title: 2020 Dividend Reminder
summary: Checks for Koniag’s next distribution will be mailed on January 24th and direct deposits will occur the same day. The distribution will be $8 per share for Classes A, B, and C. Source

title: NANA Elders’ Settlement Trust Announces 2019 Distribution
summary: The trustees of the NANA Elders’ Settlement Trust – or NEST – voted to issue a dividend of $965 per Elder for 2019. The dividend will be paid on or around February 12, 2020, and is not taxable. Elders who are NANA shareholders and 65 or older as of December 31, 2019, will receive the dividend. Those...
